customer_balance.sql: SELECT CARI_KOD, CARI_ISIM, BORC, ALACAK, (BORC - ALACAK) AS BAKIYE FROM CARI_HESAPLAR WHERE CARI_ISIM LIKE ?
customer_balance.note: ETA V8 default table. Adjust for your version.

unpaid_invoices.sql: SELECT FATURA_NO, MUSTERI, TUTAR, VADE_TARIH FROM FATURALAR WHERE ODENDI = 0 AND VADE_TARIH < ? ORDER BY VADE_TARIH

search_transactions.sql: SELECT TARIH, ACIKLAMA, TUTAR, TIP FROM HAREKETLER WHERE ACIKLAMA LIKE ? AND TARIH BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY TARIH DESC
search_transactions.note: Transaction search by keyword and date range

daily_summary.sql: SELECT TIP, COUNT(*) as ADET, SUM(TUTAR) as TOPLAM FROM HAREKETLER WHERE TARIH = ? GROUP BY TIP
daily_summary.note: Daily transaction summary grouped by type
